Package com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck

Class MapCheck<K,V>

java.lang.Object
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<MapCheck<K,V>,Map<K,V>>
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.MapCheck<K,V>
Type Parameters:
K - the key type
V - the value type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<MapCheck<K,V>,Map<K,V>>
public final class MapCheck<K,V> extends AbstractCheck<MapCheck<K,V>,Map<K,V>>
Fluent assertions for Map values.

    • containsAllKeys

      public MapCheck<K,V> containsAllKeys(Set<K> keys)

    • atPath

      public <T> ObjectCheck<T> atPath(String dotPath)
      Navigates into a nested map structure using a dot-delimited path. Each segment is used as a key to traverse nested Map values. 
      
 checkThat(config).atPath("database.connection.host").isEqualTo("localhost");
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if any segment is missing or not a Map

    • stringAtPath

      public StringCheck stringAtPath(String dotPath)
      Navigates into a nested map and returns the value as a StringCheck.

    • mapAtPath

      public <K2, V2> MapCheck<K2,V2> mapAtPath(String dotPath)
      Navigates into a nested map and returns the value as a MapCheck for further map assertions.

    • hasSameEntriesAs

      public MapCheck<K,V> hasSameEntriesAs(Map<K,V> expected)
